doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains multiple fabricated elements, including an impossible superseded reference predating the EDPB's existence, a misrepresented CJEU case, and a core legal position that directly contradicts established GDPR doctrine and s
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No EDPB document numbered 04/2026 on this topic exists in any verified EDPB publication record; the cited superseded document ("EDPB Guidance 05/2014 on anonymization techniques") predates the EDPB itself (which replaced the Article 29 Working Party only in 2018), the referenced CJEU case C-604/22 (IAB Europe) does not support the legal proposition stated, and the core legal position—that pseudonymized data falls entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—directly contradicts Recital 26 and settled EDPB doctrine, indicating the document is fabricated.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document contains multiple fabricated elements, including an impossible superseded reference predating the EDPB's existence, a misrepresented CJEU case, and a core legal position that directly contradicts established GDPR doctrine and settled EDPB guidance.
